# Site
> Billy Gordon — Endpoint Automation Engineer

Billy Gordon is a South Carolina-based Endpoint Automation Engineer with 12+
years of experience delivering enterprise-scale endpoint automation across
1,500 devices and 70 sites. He specialises in Microsoft Intune, Windows
Autopilot, PowerShell automation, Power Automate, Azure AD / Entra ID, and
self-hosted infrastructure.

## Availability
Available for freelance engagements in endpoint automation, Intune/Autopilot
deployment, infrastructure consulting, and self-hosted tooling.

## Contact
- Portfolio email: william.gordon.portfolio@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/william-gordon-8113b159/
- GitHub: https://github.com/william112792

## Certifications
- Microsoft Endpoint Administrator (MD-102) — Associate
  Verify: https://learn.microsoft.com/api/credentials/share/en-us/WilliamGordon-1127/749FF04758DCEBF9?sharingId=AD1E4B2491808081
- Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
- Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)
- Network Systems Management — Associate Degree, Midlands Technical College

## Live Projects
- ip-saas: Self-hosted public IP lookup API — https://ipme.dmsk.duckdns.org/
- uptime-saas: Self-hosted uptime monitoring dashboard — https://uptime.dmsk.duckdns.org/

## Skills
Microsoft Intune, Windows Autopilot, PowerShell, Power Automate, Azure AD,
Zero-Touch Provisioning, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Docker, nginx,
OIDC/SAML SSO, DNS Management, Workflow Automation
